title: MP DTE B.E/B.Tech Counselling 2026

detail.short_info: MP DTE B.E/B.Tech Counselling 2026 registration is expected to start in May–June 2026. Check the complete schedule, eligibility, application process, important dates, and official link at dte.mponline.gov.in for Madhya Pradesh engineering admissions.

content.text: MP DTE B.E/B.Tech Counselling 2026 registration and choice filling is expected to begin in May–June 2026. The Directorate of Technical Education (DTE), Madhya Pradesh conducts the centralized online counselling for admission to B.E/B.Tech courses in government, aided, and private engineering colleges across the state. Admissions are primarily based on JEE Main 2026 scores, with Class 12 marks considered for remaining vacant seats.
